resources.string:
Analyze the provided medical certificate and give a detailed breakdown of the following:
1. Disease Information: - Identify the disease or condition mentioned in the certificate. - Provide a detailed explanation of the disease, including symptoms, causes, and possible complications.
2. Medication Information: - Identify all medications prescribed. - Provide detailed explanations for each medication, including its purpose, dosage, possible side effects, and how it helps treat the disease or condition.
Ensure accuracy and clarity in the descriptions, using the latest medical guidelines.
